name: Breville Barista Express Espresso Machine
tagline: The best home espresso machine under $700
personalNote: I've made over 1,000 lattes on this thing. It paid for itself in 3 months vs. buying coffee out. The built-in grinder is a game changer.

name: Sony WH-1000XM5 Noise Cancelling Headphones
tagline: The gold standard for noise cancelling headphones
personalNote: I wear these every single day. The noise cancelling is unreal — I can't work without them. Comfortable enough for 8+ hour sessions.

name: Anker 7-in-1 USB-C Hub
tagline: The only dongle you need for your MacBook
personalNote: Tiny, reliable, and has every port I need. HDMI, USB-A, SD card, and passthrough charging. Lives permanently in my laptop bag.

name: YETI Rambler 20 oz Tumbler
tagline: Keeps coffee hot for hours, survives everything
personalNote: I've dropped this thing on concrete, left it in the car overnight in winter, and it still keeps my coffee hot for 6+ hours. Indestructible.
